prompt: Create an ultra-realistic wide-angle selfie photograph from a dramatic high, top-down perspective at the edge of a completely drained indoor swimming pool. A single adult man, South Asian man with short black hair, stands alone near the deep end threshold and looks upward toward the camera, holding it at arm’s length so his extended sleeve dominates the lower-left foreground. He wears a bright pale yellow-green long-sleeve button-up shirt, dark trousers, and brown shoes, and holds a smartphone in his other hand. His face is intentionally covered by a soft rectangular blur for anonymity. The empty pool is large and rectangular, lined with worn pale blue and white tiles, dark blue lane markings, depth signs reading 6 ft and 7 ft, metal ladders on the right side, rounded tiled steps in the far-left corner, drain grates around the rim, and visible scuffs, stains, and dirt on the dry pool floor. The indoor natatorium has high windows along the upper walls casting strong rectangular sunlight patches and long shadows across the tiles, with a quiet abandoned atmosphere. Use natural daylight, crisp architectural detail, realistic perspective distortion from a phone ultra-wide lens, high dynamic range, subtle filmic color grading, and documentary-style realism. No extra people, no water, no text overlays, no watermark.
